packages.rationale: Sovereign rail + moat anchor path. Raised 2026-04-20 from 42/86/58/42 → 61/86/71/61 by bringing memo-submitter.ts to 100% (Connection-mocked submission + isAvailable + revocation tests). Remaining gap is web3js-adapter.ts (USDC transfer RPC: sendUsdc / sendUsdcBatch / getTransaction) and rail.ts — both pending Connection-mock tests in a follow-up pass. Close by mirroring the memo-submitter mock pattern on the adapter's SPL-token paths, then raise both threshold and this manifest together per the doctrine's drift rule.
